scripts.predev: npm run copy-assets && node scripts/fix-monaco-sourcemap.mjs && node scripts/format-templates.mjs && npm run bundle:parse-bridge && npm run stage:parse-bridge
scripts.prebuild: npm run copy-assets && node scripts/fix-monaco-sourcemap.mjs && node scripts/format-templates.mjs && npm run bundle:parse-bridge && npm run stage:parse-bridge
scripts.build:app: npm run prepare:dist && npm run build && npm run stage:parse-bridge && npm run stage:pack
scripts.build:win: npm run clean:release && npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs win
scripts.build:mac: npm run clean:release && npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs mac
scripts.build:linux: npm run clean:release && npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs linux
